description: The Box Vertex Value Spatial Variable`1 component makes a spatial variable that provides samplers with a different value depending on what vertex of the area a sampler is closest to. This is similar to the color properties of a box emitter.

fields.Size: The size of the cube for this spatial variable's influence.
fields.Value0: The value sampled when near the 0th vertex.
fields.Value1: The value sampled when near the 1st vertex.
fields.Value2: The value sampled when near the 2nd vertex.
fields.Value3: The value sampled when near the 3rd vertex.
fields.Value4: The value sampled when near the 4th vertex.
fields.Value5: The value sampled when near the 5th vertex.
fields.Value6: The value sampled when near the 6th vertex.
fields.Value7: The value sampled when near the 7th vertex.

usage: Attach to a slot and provide a size and variable name in order for this to function.
